$comment: Machine-readable creative honesty rules. Embedded in every generated render payload so renders carry their constraints. Generalize or tighten these for your own products.

allowedEdits: background replacement (simple, neutral, or restrained lifestyle)
lighting and color correction that does not change product condition
forbiddenEdits: retouching scratches, dents, or wear off the product itself
compositing in accessories, packaging, or items not sold with the unit
swapping product color or model variants
image.backgroundStyle: simple, premium, uncluttered; product is always the focus

video.motionStyle: restrained — gentle zoom/pan and simple fades only
video.messagingScope: trust and value only (refurbished certification, warranty, price)
video.endCard: brand + CTA, no condition claims beyond the approved overlays

copy.noLikeNewClaims: Never claim 'like new' or 'flawless' — use 'Certified Refurbished'.
copy.priceTextIsDemoOnly: priceText in manifests is for demo mockups; verify live price before any real campaign.
